differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune hemolytic anemia (AIHA) with associated bone marrow suppression
next_steps: Flow cytometry for PNH (CD55 and CD59 deficiency on erythrocytes and granulocytes)
Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with cytogenetics
Serum ferritin, triglycerides, and soluble CD25 (IL-2 receptor) levels to evaluate for HLH
Peripheral blood smear review by a hematopathologist
Vitamin B12, folate, and copper levels to rule out nutritional deficiencies
Repeat lactate dehydrogenase and haptoglobin to confirm ongoing hemolysis
